gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/227)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/227)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا دَخَلْتُ الْكَعْبَةَ كَيْفَ أَصْنَعُ قَالَ خُذْ بِحَلْقَتَيِ الْبَابِ إِذَا دَخَلْتَ ثُمَّ امْضِ حَتَّى تَأْتِيَ الْعَمُودَيْنِ فَصَلِّ عَلَى الرُّخَامَةِ الْحَمْرَاءِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَرَجْتَ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ فَنَزَلْتَ مِنَ الدَّرَجَةِ فَصَلِّ عَنْ يَمِينِكَ رَكْعَتَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘When I enter the Kabah, so what should I do?’ Heasws said: ‘Grab hold of the two rings of the (Door of the Kabah) when you enter, then go until you come to the two Pillars, so offer Salaat upon the red marble. Then, when you exit from the House (Kabah), so climb down from the stairs, and perform Salaat on your right, by two Cycles’.
en.sarwar: 10. It is narrated from him (narrator of previous Hadith) from ibn Faddal from Yunus who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘What should I do when I enter al-Ka‘bah? He (the Imam) said, ‘When entering hold the two rings of the door, then move forward until you reach the two pillars, then perform Salat (prayer) on the red marble. When you leave the House and climb down, perform two Rak‘at Salat (prayer) on your right side.’” (Fatwa best explains Hadith 5-10 of this Chapter)
